title: Research Radar — Tue May 12: Focus on LLM Infrastructure and AI Agent Frameworks
headline: Focus on LLM Infrastructure and AI Agent Frameworks
summary_text: Today's research highlights a strong emphasis on developing infrastructure for large language models (LLMs) and frameworks for AI agents. Projects like 'mlflow' and 'openai-agents-python' showcase advancements in orchestrating AI workflows and optimizing model performance.
